mapper.select: SELECT plwl.id AS likeId, plwl.sys_user_id , plwl.creator AS likeCreator, plwl.add_datetime AS likeAddDatetime, plwl.operator AS likeOperator, plwl.operation_datetime AS likeOperationDatetime, pbplw.id , pbplw.creator , pbplw.add_datetime , pbplw.operator , pbplw.operation_datetime , pbplw.lead_type, pbplw.lead_title, pbplw.recorder, pbplw.record_datetime, pbplw.name_party, pbplw.town_street, pbplw.party_organization, pbplw.location, pbplw.content, pbplw.photo, pbplw.publish_status, pbplw.name_party_picture, pbplw.area_id, pbplw.likes_number, pbplw.views_number FROM party_lead_work_likes plwl JOIN party_building_party_lead_work pbplw ON plwl.party_lead_work_id = pbplw.id WHERE pbplw.lead_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{leadTitle}, '%')
